responses.electricityComment: there are power cuts , but usually short , can be bypassed with a inverter , rest is good
responses.roadComment: actually , there is no encroachment , but alot of congestion , you can use a cycle and reach the place just as fast as a car , there are some potholes , low quality bitumen is used in recent years
responses.safetyComment: it's the dogs 🥀 , and random uncles and aunties that have nothing to bother the youth and have entitlement
responses.commentsText: Fucking Uncles and Aunties man 🥀 , they are the only plague in chandigarh
